content:
🚀 Version 4.8 now integrates all skill-based mechanics, class-driven agency, literary roleplay, and strategic mastery exam scaffolding.
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖



📌 Version 4.9 – Mastery Exam Expansion, Three-Tiered Narrator POVs, Redemption Paths of Betrayal, & Class Structure Refinements


🚀 Fully integrating Mastery Exams as skill-based mini-Olympics, refining redemption paths, expanding class narrators with restrictions, and ensuring class paths don’t remove sections but instead guide them.

📜 1. Mastery Exams – “The Fool’s Gauntlet”

📜 Newly Named: “The Fool’s Gauntlet: Prove Your Mastery or Fall from Grace”
✔ Tests all skill-based elements from the week’s structure in a compressed but rigorous format.
✔ Each week’s exam scaffolds across all four lenses (Concrete, Abstract, Connecting, Exploratory).
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 97 (chunk 97/555)
